---
title: "DesignCTER (User Guide)"
---



















---

**App Link:** <https://design-cter.netlify.app>

**GitHub Repo:** <https://github.com/Lightbridge-KS/designCTER>

---

## Body CT

### CTWA





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Routine WA & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), Rectal (water) \\ 
— & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (?), Rectal (?) \\ 
Solid Organ Rupture & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & No oral, No rectal \\ 
Free Air & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain

\item Venous (may be)

\end{itemize} & Oral (positive), Rectal (positive) {[}If not stable -\textgreater{} no oral, no rectal{]} \\ 
GI Perforation & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited positive), Rectal (positive) \\ 
Gut Obstruction & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay 3 min (liver)

\end{itemize} & No oral, No rectal \\ 
HBP mass/abscess (CTWA) & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (upper)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
Kidney mass/abscess & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (KUB)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (100 sec)

\item Delay (KUB)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
GI Mass & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (full positive), Rectal (water) \\ 
Diverticulitis & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), Rectal (1 L, positive CM) \\ 
Pancreatitis & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (upper)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
Intra-abdominal infection & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), Rectal (water) \\ 
Leak-Fistula-Collection & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (if Hx bowel resect -\textgreater{} full positive; If not -\textgreater{} limited positive), Rectal (positive) ? \\ 
CT Second look Abd (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, Oral (full positive), Rectal (positive) \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CTA Whole Abdomen





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
GI Bleed & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (whole)

\end{itemize} & No oral, No rectal \\ 
Mesenteric Ischemia & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item Delay (whole)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), Rectal (water) \\ 
AAA Rupture & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole)

\item CTA (maybe ถ้ามีเวลา คนไข้ stable)

\item Venous (maybe ถ้ามีเวลา คนไข้ stable)

\end{itemize} & No oral, No rectal \\ 
CTA Blunt Abdomen (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item may be Delay (in injury site)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, No oral, No rectal \\ 
CTA Penetrating Abd (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item may be Delay (in injury site)
*** วาง marker ตําแหน่งแผลด้วย

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, Oral \& Rectal full positive (ถ้ามีเวลา) \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CT Upper Abdomen





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Routine Upper Abd & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (upper)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
HBP mass/abscess (Upper) & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (upper)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (upper)

\item Delay (upper)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
Biliary Stone & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (upper)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (upper)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
Adrenal mass/abscess & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (upper)

\item Late A (upper)

\item Venous (upper)

\item Delay 3 min (upper)
*** Check ภาพ +/- Delay 15 min (adrenal)

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No rectal \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CT Lower Abdomen





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Appendicitis & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous 120 sec (L3 to pubic symphysis)

\end{itemize} & Rectal (Positive 1 L สวนถึง cecum), No oral \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CT KUB






::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Hematuria & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (KUB)

\item Late A (Kidney)

\item Venous (KUB)

\item Delay (KUB)
*** Check ภาพก่อนเลิก

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No Rectal \\ 
Kidney mass/Abscess & *** If suspect renal mass → consider CTWA for staging

\begin{itemize}
\item Plain (KUB)

\item Late A (Upper)

\item Venous (100 sec)

\item Delay (KUB)
*** Check ภาพก่อนเลิก

\end{itemize} & Oral (limited water), No Rectal \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CTA for PE





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
CTA for PE (ไม่ลากขา) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTPA (chest)

\item Venous (chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CTA for PE with DVT & \begin{itemize}
\item CTPA (chest)

\item Venous (chest, legs)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::






### CT Chest





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Routine CT Chest & \begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{maybe} plain (chest)

\item Late A (chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
Nodule/mass characterization & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (chest)

\item Late A (chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
Tracheobronchomalacia & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (chest, dynamic expiration)

\end{itemize} & No IV contrast \\ 
Dysphagia & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (chest)

\item Venous (chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, Oral (limited water) \\ 
CT esophagogram & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (Chest, reduced dose) ก่อนกิน CM

\item จากนั้น กิน CM 1 cup (250 ml) ที่เตียง

\item Venous (Chest) หลังกิน CM

\end{itemize} & Oral (Positive CM) \\ 
SVC Obstruction & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (Chest, reduced dose)

\item Late A (Chest)

\item Immediate delay (Chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::






### CT Chest + WA





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
— & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (Chest + Whole abd)

\item Late A (Chest + Upper abd)

\item Venous (Whole abd)

\item Delay (liver)

\end{itemize} & Oral (?), Rectal (?) \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::






### CTA Chest 





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Hemoptysis & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (Chest)

\item CTA (Apex to L2) → Systemic arterial phase

\item Immediate delay (Chest)

\end{itemize}

\begin{itemize}
\item Note: L2 (Celiac Axis) ให้เห็น renal artery origin

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CTA Chest (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (Chest)

\item Venous (Chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, No Oral, No Rectal \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CTA Whole Aorta





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Aorta first time & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole aorta)

\item CTA (whole aorta)

\item Immediate delay (whole aorta)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
Aortic Dissection & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole aorta)

\item CTA (whole aorta)

\item Immediate delay (whole aorta)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
AAA Post-op & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain (whole aorta)

\item CTA (whole aorta)

\item Immediate delay (whole aorta)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





### CTA Runoff





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{lll}
\toprule
Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
CTA Runoff & ขา → Aortic bifurcation to feet
แขน → mid-heart to hands

\begin{itemize}
\item Plain

\item CTA

\item Immediate delay

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CTA Runoff (\textless{} 60 yr) & ขา → Aortic bifurcation to feet
แขน → mid-heart to hands

\begin{itemize}
\item CTA

\item Immediate delay

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::






## Neuro CT





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{llll}
\toprule
Exam & Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
CT Brain (non-contrast) & — & — & No IV contrast \\ 
CTA Brain & Intracranial aneurysm & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain, CTA, post-contrast (Brain)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CTV Brain & Venous Sinus Thrombosis & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain, CTV, post-contrast (Brain)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CT Brain with Contrast & — & \begin{itemize}
\item Plain, post-contrast (Brain)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::





## Trauma CT





::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
\begingroup
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{longtable}{llll}
\toprule
Exam & Protocol & Phase Design & Contrast \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
CTA Chest & CTA Chest (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (Chest)

\item Venous (Chest)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, No Oral, No Rectal \\ 
CTA Neck & CTA Neck (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (brain, neck) COW to arch

\item Post-contrast (brain)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast \\ 
CT Facial Bone (non-contrast) & CT Facial Bone (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CT Facial Bones (plain) with 3D reformats

\end{itemize} & No IV contrast \\ 
CT Orbit (non-contrast) & CT Orbit (trauma) & — & No IV contrast \\ 
CTA Whole Abd & CTA Blunt Abdomen (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item may be Delay (in injury site)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, No oral, No rectal \\ 
CTA Whole Abd & CTA Penetrating Abd (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item CTA (whole)

\item Venous (whole)

\item may be Delay (in injury site)
*** วาง marker ตําแหน่งแผลด้วย

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, Oral \& Rectal full positive (ถ้ามีเวลา) \\ 
CTWA & CT Second look Abd (trauma) & \begin{itemize}
\item Venous (whole)

\end{itemize} & IV contrast, Oral (full positive), Rectal (positive) \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
\endgroup

:::
:::
